headline: MMM Q1 Deep Dive: Productivity Gains and Strategic Moves Amid Mixed Growth Signals
summary: Industrial conglomerate 3M (NYSE:MMM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 3.9% year on year to $6.00 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.14 per share was 7.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: 3M Stock Pulls Back, But Catalysts Point to New Highs
summary: 3M faces headwinds, but internal improvements are offsetting them, setting the company up to continue growing and generating cash flow.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on 3M, Raises Price Target to $165
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe O'Dea   maintains 3M (NYSE:MMM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $160 to $165.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Underperform on 3M, Lowers Price Target to $133
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Deane Dray   maintains 3M (NYSE:MMM) with a Underperform and lowers the price target from $134 to $133.

summary: 3M Co (MMM) reports robust earnings with a focus on innovation and shareholder returns, despite facing macroeconomic challenges.

headline: Assessing 3M (MMM) Valuation After Q1 2026 Earnings Beat And Guidance Update
summary: 3M (MMM) is back in focus after its Q1 2026 report showed sales of US$6.03b and adjusted earnings of US$2.14 per share, both above analyst expectations, with management reiterating full year adjusted EPS guidance. See our latest analysis for 3M. Despite the earnings beat, 3M's share price has been under pressure recently, with a 1-day share price return of a 1.94% decline and a 7-day share price return of a 2.67% decline. At the same time, its 1-year total shareholder return stands at 10.91%...
